steps.title: Substitute x into the second equation
steps.content: Since the first equation gives $x = 8$, substitute this value into the second equation: $$8 + 3y = 26$$

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content:
Subtract 8 from both sides: $$3y = 26 - 8$$ $$3y = 18$$
Divide both sides by 3: $$y = 6$$

steps.title: Final Answer
steps.content: That matches choice C — C is correct.
